ORDER AFTER HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER HEARST NEWSPAPERS PARTNERSHIP LP DBA THE SAN FRANCISCO CHRONICLE'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE TO COMPEL RELEASE OF PUBLIC RECORDS WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 11/18/04. RULING: THE COURT ORDERS THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF REAL ESTATE TO IMMEDIATELY PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS CONTAINED IN EXHIBIT A TO BILL MORAN'S DECLARATION; THE ORDER IS STAYED TO TUESDAY, 11/23/04 AT 9:00 AM TO ENABLE THE DEPARTMENT TO SEEK APPELLATE REVIEW. IF APPELLATE REVIEW IS NOT GRANTED, THE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WILL BE TURNED OVER BY 9:00 AM ON 11/23/04. HON. JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR 1558

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Release Of Public Records
Off Calendar Nov-19-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER HEARST NEWSPAPERS PARTNERSHIP, LP,'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Release Of Public Records: IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Release Of Public Records
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Continued To Nov-18-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Karl Olson, Esq., Levy Ram Olson & Rossi LLP (415) 433-4949 for Petitioner and Moving Party Hearst Newspapers Partnership LP
Anne Michelle Burr, Deputy Attorney General (415) 703-1403 f or Respondent and Opposing Party Department of Real Estate

RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER HEARST NEWSPAPERS PARTNERSHIP, LP'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Release Of Public Records is CONTINUED to 11/18/04 at which time it will be taken under submission. Counsel for California Department of Real Estate shall file, under seal, with the Court duplicate copies of every complaint filed for the last 4 years against Julie Lee, Kit Lee and First National Realty and serve and file on the Court and Petitioner a declaration in this regard no later than 3 PM on 11/18/04. The Court will issue a statement of decision on 11/19/04; any decision issued by the Court will be stayed for 24 hours. Attorney Olson shall submit a proposed form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
